items.headline: 4-unit condo building permitted in Venture City
items.summary: Foundry Condo at 31 Isabela Tr receives permit for a 4-unit residential building ($1.18M). This adds to housing supply in the Venture City development area.

items.headline: Dual ADUs permitted at single North 2nd Street address
items.summary: Two detached ADUs (units 5 and 6) are permitted at 795 N 2nd St, each valued at $117,686. The pairing suggests a coordinated infill housing project on a single lot.

items.headline: City Council revokes tobacco retailer permits for two shops
items.summary: Campbell City Council held public hearings to revoke business licenses and tobacco retailer permits for California Cigar and Hayes Smoke Shop. The specific reasons for revocation were not detailed in the agenda.

items.headline: City Council to study Health and Safety Element updates for General Plan
items.summary: The City Council is holding a study session to update the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's General Plan covering 2015–2040. This element addresses how the city plans to manage risks and protect residents' well-being through land use and policy decisions.

items.headline: Planning Commission to hear overview of state housing law SB 79
items.summary: The Heritage Preservation Commission will hear a presentation on California's Abundant and Affordable Homes Near Transit Act (SB 79 from 2025). This state law affects how cities approve housing projects near transit, potentially reshaping development rules in Sunnyvale.
